name: Anthropic
tagline: Editorial warmth with mixed serif-sans hierarchy and layered card elevation; weighty yet inviting — the research-institution aesthetic.

palette.description: warm ivory + near-black palette deployed with mixed serif-sans typography, larger 20px body, three-layer card shadows, and subtle editorial texture — scholarly density with a humanist undertone

typography.heading: Outfit
typography.style: mixed serif-sans hierarchy: Source Serif 4 for editorial headlines and reading text, Outfit for geometric sans headings, DM Sans for UI, Lora for data tables, IBM Plex Mono for code; full Chinese serif/sans support

best_for: Research reports, white papers, economic/industry analysis, board presentations, thought leadership, policy briefs, academic decks. Anything that should project institutional credibility, intellectual weight, and editorial refinement.
avoid_for: Contexts that need playful, casual, or rapid-fire energy — the mixed-serif hierarchy and dense editorial layout commits to a scholarly, deliberative voice.
